Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5128 0 0}It's a strong enemy! Please watch your health![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5128 0 0}We can't let our guard down against this enemy! I'll do everything I can to support you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5128 0 0}Enemy incoming! Be cautious of what they do![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5008 0 0}We have no data on this opponent...! Don't let your guard down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_YUKARI_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1117 0 0}No matter what shows up, I'll do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_JUNPEI_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}Alright! Make sure you watch me in action![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_SANADA_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 9 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3116 0 0}Looks like this'll be interesting. Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_SANADA_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3116 0 0}I can't afford to lose. Now, come get me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_MITSURU_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4117 0 0}There will always be an opening to strike. Let's take it down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_AEGIS_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6007 0 0}The enemy is within range. Commencing battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_AEGIS_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6007 0 0}A powerful reading, as expected...! I'm going all out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_ARAGAKI_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9109 0 0}Well... Time to do this. Hope you're ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_ARAGAKI_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9109 0 0}Talk about a pain... Don't let your guard down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_METIS_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 11 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 30111 0 0}No matter who I'm up against, I'll always protect my sister![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_AEGIS_2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6117 0 0}This seems like a tough target. Be careful, everyone![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_MONAD_BTL_AEGIS_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6118 0 0}Let's work together on this. I'll give this my all as well![n]{f 1 1}
